insights.title: Gasoil rockets to 52W high $284.97 as Gulf refinery outages compound
insights.detail: Gasoil +$46.51 (+19.5%) to new peak; crack to Murban at $170/bbl. Sitra FM-004 (405 kb/d) + Ruwais-2 sd-009 (417 kb/d) + Al-Ahmadi sd-018 (730 kb/d) = ~1,550 kb/d offline.

related_event.summary: Sitra FM-004 (405 kb/d) + Ruwais-2 sd-009 (417 kb/d) + Al-Ahmadi sd-018 (730 kb/d) compound

insights.title: WTI-Brent inverts to -$2.51 as WTI hits 52W high $111.54
insights.detail: WTI +$11.42 (+11.4%) surpasses Brent for first time in crisis. Iraq FM-024 (Basra 900k from 3.3M bpd) + VLCC struck at Dubai sd-023; SPR at just 15.9% of 426 mb committed.

related_event.summary: VLCC Al Salmi struck at Dubai port (2M bbl cargo); hull damage + fire; WTI spiked same session

insights.title: AWRP hits 52W high $2.45/bbl; hull-value war risk at 33x pre-crisis
insights.detail: Platts AWRP +$0.25 (+11.4%); hull-value rate at 5.0% from 0.15% pre-conflict. VLCC struck at Dubai sd-023 triggers repricing; US DFC doubles Hormuz reinsurance to $40B.

related_event.summary: US DFC doubles Hormuz reinsurance to $40B; Chubb-led syndicate; hull rates stable at 5% tiered

insights.title: Ammonia hits 52W high $650/mt as petchem FM cascade goes global
insights.detail: Ammonia +$25 (+4%) to new peak, +36.8% since Feb. Five petchem FMs in March (fm-025/26/27/28/29). Naphtha >$1,000/mt per Formosa FM-027; Qatar 2,140 kt/y petchem 100% offline.

related_event.summary: Formosa Plastics FM-027 on PVC/HDPE/PE; FPCC at ~50% capacity; naphtha >$1,000/mt from Gulf disruption

insights.title: TTF plunges 8.4% while JKM holds — Leviathan restart eases Europe
insights.detail: TTF -$1.51 to $16.47 extending correction from 52W high $22.50; JKM flat at $17.86. Chevron Leviathan FM-005 partially lifted Apr 2; domestic gas ramping, export FM remains.

related_event.summary: Chevron Leviathan FM-005 partially lifted; restart announced; domestic ramping, export FM active
